title: ReportSynthesis
description: LLM-generated narrative fields for the MarketReport. Structured data sections are built separately from tool outputs.

executive_summary.description: Dense, insight-driven summary of the market position. Max 120 words.

recommendations.description: 3 to 5 concrete, actionable recommendations grounded in the data.

confidence_score.description: 0.0 to 1.0. Reflects data completeness and signal quality across tools.
